title: Round Cacti
description: Adds Round Cacti, similar to Motchen's Round Trees!
body:
I created a model similar to those used by Motschen in his Round Trees mod, but for Cacti.

Consider this sort of an add-on to Motchen's work. If you get this you probably want that too, though this will work on its own. 
[Get Round Trees by Motschen here.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/round-trees)
